new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift - prepare for UCEA communication
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra has kicked off coordination for the non-clinical pay uplift with main holiday season approaching. Kevin needs to understand the timeline, any PeopleXD configuration changes required, and coordinate with payroll on implementation readiness.

new_tasks.title: Access Group call - volunteering hours recording options
new_tasks.description: Simon Burford has raised a formal call with Access Group to get confirmation on options for allowing employees to record volunteer leave on PeopleXD. Kevin needs to review the outcome and provide guidance on the feasible solution.
new_tasks.email_subject: Recording volunteer leave on PeopleXD by Employees
